channel.title: Blue Cross VT News Mentions
channel.description: Mentions of BCBSVT, Blue Cross VT, and Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont from Vermont news outlets.

item.title: MyNBC5: Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont seeks smaller premium increase this year
item.category: Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont
item.description:
Source: MyNBC5

Matched terms: Blue Cross VT, Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont, Blue Cross

Advertisement Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont seeks smaller premium increase this year The single digit percentage increases would be the smallest the last several years, Blue Cross VT said. Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Vermont seeks smaller premium increase this yea ...

item.title: WCAX: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Vermont files for rate increases with state
item.category: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Vermont
item.description:
Source: WCAX

Matched terms: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Vermont, Blue Cross

ShareAdd Us On GoogleAdd as a preferred source on GoogleBURLINGTON, Vt. (WCAX) - Blue Cross Blue Shield of Vermont has filed its 2027 premium rate request with state healthcare regulators.The insurer wants to increase rates for small groups 3.1%, and 5.2% for individuals.Related Stories:Final plans released for Vt. hospital transformationV ...

Read the original story

item.title: VTDigger: UVM Health must cut expenses by $300 million in three years, independent liaison finds
item.description:
Source: VTDigger

Matched terms: BCBSVT, BlueCross BlueShield of Vermont

... board in fiscal years 2023 and 2024. The liaison team, helmed by Mike Smith, has worked since spring 2025 to oversee the network’s 2025 budget proposal, contract negotiations with BlueCross BlueShield of Vermont and other ongoing work surrounding affordability, access and quality of care. Though the liaison team does not have regulatory authority or the power to compel the hospital to act, its memos hold sway with the hospital group’s b ...

Read the original story

item.title: Vermont Business Magazine: 2026 Best of Business in Vermont recipients announced

... st Company of Vermont Best Employee Benefits Firm: The Richards Group Best Commercial Property/Casualty Insurance Provider: Kinney Insurance Agency Best Health Insurance Provider: BlueCross BlueShield of Vermont Best Large Health Care Provider: 600+ Employees University of Vermont Medical Center Best Small Health Care Provider: Less than 600 Employees Copley Hospital Best Auto Dealership: Handy Cars Best Truck Dealership: Handy Toyota B ...

item.title: Brattleboro Reformer: Vermont DFR warns of potential health insurance scams
item.category: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Vermont
item.description:
Source: Brattleboro Reformer

Matched terms: BCBSVT, Blue Cross Blue Shield of Vermont, Blue Cross

... ealth Plans are only available from Vermont Health Connect (VHC), which is administered by the Department of Vermont Health Access, or directly from the health insurance companies Blue Cross Blue Shield of Vermont (BCBSVT) and MVP Health Care. The annual open enrollment period for selecting a Qualified Health Plan is November 1, 2024, to January 15, 2025. While health insurance fraud scams occur throughout the year, scammers increase th ...

Read the original story
